headline: W. R. Berkley (NYSE:WRB) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
summary: Property casualty insurer W. R. Berkley (NYSE:WRB) fell short of the market’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026 as sales rose 4% year on year to $3.69 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.30 per share was 14.1% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: W. R. Berkley Corporation Reports First Quarter 2026 Results

headline: WR Berkley Q1 Adj. EPS $1.30 Beats $1.15 Estimate, Sales $3.690B Miss $3.759B Estimate
summary: WR Berkley (NYSE:WRB) reported quarterly earnings of $1.30 per share which beat the analyst consensus estimate of $1.15 by 13.04 percent. This is a 23.81 percent increase over earnings of $1.05 per share from the same
